mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.order_sn, o.coupon_id, o.integration, o.member_id, o.order_type, o.use_integration, ot.id ot_id, ot.product_name ot_product_name, ot.product_sku_id ot_product_sku_id, ot.product_sku_code ot_product_sku_code, ot.product_quantity ot_product_quantity FROM oms_order o LEFT JOIN oms_order_item ot ON o.id = ot.order_id WHERE o.id = #{orderId}

SELECT o.id, o.order_sn, o.coupon_id, o.integration, o.member_id, o.order_type, o.use_integration, ot.id ot_id, ot.product_name ot_product_name, ot.product_sku_id ot_product_sku_id, ot.product_sku_code ot_product_sku_code, ot.product_quantity ot_product_quantity FROM oms_order o LEFT JOIN oms_order_item ot ON o.id = ot.order_id WHERE o.status = 0 AND o.create_time < date_add(NOW(), INTERVAL -#{minute} MINUTE);
mapper.update: UPDATE oms_order SET status = 4 WHERE id = #{orderId} AND status = 0 AND delete_status = 0

UPDATE pms_sku_stock SET lock_stock = CASE id
WHEN #{item.productSkuId} THEN GREATEST(lock_stock - #{item.productQuantity}, 0)
END WHERE id IN
#{item.productSkuId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oms_order_request (member_id, request_id, create_time) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{requestId}, #{createTime})
